name: v2.9.0
body:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at release-v2.9.x -->

## Summary

### Application Performance Monitoring (APM)

#### twmb/franz-go integration
Adds a new contrib package providing tracing for the [twmb/franz-go](https://github.com/twmb/franz-go) Kafka client. [#4250](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4250)

#### Trace context propagation hardening
Adds validation and explicit limits on incoming trace context headers:
- Baggage extraction enforces per-item and total byte limits. [#4720](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4720)
- `dd=` list-entries over 256 bytes are dropped from incoming `tracestate`. [#4721](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4721)
- `x-datadog-tags` extraction uses the configurable `MaxTagsHeaderLen`. [#4727](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4727)

#### Service name origin signaling
Adds `svc.user`/`svc.auto` process tags so consumers can distinguish whether a service name was user-configured vs. auto-detected. [#4725](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4725)

### Application Security Management (ASM)

#### RFC-1012 ASM tags, metrics, and logs consolidation
Closes remaining gaps in the RFC-1012 ASM observability consolidation effort across tags, metrics, and logs. [#4708](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4708)

### LLM Observability

#### Multi-run experiments
Adds support for running LLM evaluation experiments across multiple iterations. [#4660](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4660)

#### FlushSync API
Adds an internal `FlushSync` capability for forcing synchronous flush of LLM Observability data — useful for tests and short-lived processes. [#4695](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4695)

### Profiling

#### gzip-compressed profile uploads
The profiler now supports gzip compression mode for profile payloads. [#4696](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4696) [#4697](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4697)

### CI Visibility

Performance and reliability improvements across the board: caching for test-metadata / impacted-test decisions / CODEOWNERS lookups, hardening of Go retry edge cases and parallel-test safety, and reduced overhead in the test wrapper. See the CI Visibility section below for the full list.

## What's Changed
### Application Performance Monitoring (APM)
* fix(contrib): fix batch race condition in pgx.v5 by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4669
* fix(contrib/aws/datadog-lambda): sort the logs to compare by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4677
* fix(contrib/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2): skip `_datadog` attribute if batch size larger than 262144-byte payload limit by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4665
* chore: address govulncheck alerts by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4681
* feat(contrib): add twmb/franz-go integration by @igoragoli in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4250
* fix(contrib/99designs/gqlgen): bump to v0.17.90, adjust tests accordingly by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4702
* fix(contrib/mark3labs/mcp-go): bump buger/jsonparser to v1.1.2 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4715
* feat(tracer): add svc.user/svc.auto process tags to signal service name origin by @amarziali in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4725
* fix(deps): bump klauspost/compress to v1.18.6 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4751
* feat(ddtrace/tracer): promote span fields out of meta map into a typed SpanAttributes struct by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4538
* fix(tracer): skip stats concentrator in OTLP export mode by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4609
* fix(tracer): enforce baggage item and byte limits on extraction by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4720
* fix(tracer): drop dd= list-entries over 256 bytes from incoming tracestate by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4721
* fix(tracer): use configurable MaxTagsHeaderLen for x-datadog-tags extraction by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4727
* perf(ddtrace/tracer): snapshot config in StartSpan to avoid RWMutex contention by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4713
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): wire version on aggregation key when adding a span to client-side stats by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4737

### Application Security Management (ASM)
* feat(appsec): RFC-1012 ASM Tags, Metrics & Logs Consolidation gap closure by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4708

### CI Visibility
* perf(internal/civisibility): cache SetTestFunc source metadata by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4691
* perf(internal/civisibility): cache testing field offsets by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4698
* perf(internal/civisibility): cache CODEOWNERS discovery misses by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4699
* perf(internal/civisibility): cache impacted-test decisions by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4701
* perf(internal/civisibility): reuse missing commit list by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4703
* fix(internal/civisibility): resolve trimpath source files by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4706
* fix(ci-visibility): avoid Go FailNow teardown by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4717
* fix(internal/civisibility): make parallel tests safe across retries by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4722
* fix(ci-visibility): harden Go retry edge cases by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4731
* fix(ci-visibility): harden review edge cases by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4735
* fix(ci-visibility): reduce Go test wrapper overhead by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4738
* fix(internal/civisibility): avoid tests-only race condition on CIVis reset by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4744
* fix(ci-visibility): harden mocktracer, HTTP bodies, and EFD skips by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4745
* fix(internal/civisibility): propagate ITR tests-skipping enabled tag by @anmarchenko in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4736

### LLM Observability
* fix(llmobs): flush span events buffer when it reaches certain size by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4524
* feat(llmobs): experiments multi-run by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4660
* feat(llmobs): add internal FlushSync function by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4695

### Profiling
* fix(profiler): support gzip compression mode by @felixge in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4696
* chore(profiler): better compression testing and minor fixes by @felixge in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4697

### General
* fix: labelling ecosystems workflow would fail by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4670
* ci(macrobenchmarks): integrate apm-sdks-benchmarks configurations by @faydef in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4663
* ci: unpin system-tests (back to @main) by @nccatoni in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4667
* fix(internal/telemetry): don't use default dependency loader in telemetry tests by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4673
* fix(internal/telemetry): don't use default dependency loader in telemetry tests (2) by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4676
* fix: DDCI was complaining about a missing job by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4687
* fix: old GitLab CI images were not signed by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4686
* feat: move govulncheck workflow to use slack webhook by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4679
* fix(scripts): ensure that `generate` and `fix-modules` to include transitive `dd-trace-go` packages by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4675
* docs(security): add wording of transitive dependancies by @TamaraLewis in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4672
* fix: smoke tests fail on proxy issues by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4693
* chore(ci): govulncheck -  use official golang/govulncheck-action for SARIF analysis by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4599
* feat: alert slack on smoke test failures by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4707
* refactor(config): migrate spanAttributeSchemaVersion by @funyjane in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4711
* chore(ci): run all system-tests scenario even if empty when running on master/sc… by @nccatoni in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4690
* ci(codeql): add main to push.branches to unfreeze default-branch status by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4704
* refactor(config): create a new DD_API_KEY config on internal/config by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4712
* refactor(config): migrate maxTagsHeaderLen by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4730
* ci(benchmarks): Parellelize microbenchmarks, deprecate dependency on benchmarking-platform repo by @ddyurchenko in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4718
* ci(benchmarks): Fix wrong CI image link for macrobenchmarks by @ddyurchenko in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4739
* fix: strip unused process tags by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4742
* feat: add process tags to metrics with service tag by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4724
* fix(internal/telemetry): add waitgroup for telemetry global client flush by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4714
* chore(ci): add dd-octo-sts chainguard policy files by @lloeki in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4752

## New Contributors
* @TamaraLewis made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4672
* @amarziali made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4725

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/compare/v2.8.0...v2.9.0
